explicit-reactions

(/moleculizer-input/model/explicit-reactions)

Most of the reactions that Moleculizer works with are generated automatically by reaction generators, but you can enter reactions one-at-a-time, too. The participants in an explicit reaction have to be explicit species, so that they have names and you therefore have a way to refer to them in the explicit reaction's definition.

AttributesChildren
    • reaction
